title: Ukraine Struck Russia's 'Davos' City With 1,000-Kilometer Drones
script: A day after Russia launched a mass missile strike on Kyiv, Ukraine hit back — deep inside Russia. Ukrainian drones flew more than 1,000 kilometers overnight, setting fire to a St. Petersburg oil terminal just 10 miles from where Putin was scheduled to speak at Russia's annual Economic Forum. A second wave hit a Russian warship at Kronstadt naval base and a weapons plant 600 kilometers inside Russian territory. Smoke was still rising over St. Petersburg as Putin took the stage.
